revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing programmatically created pages and categories

revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Trivia]][[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Trivia}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Trivia | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | issue = contains a '''[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Trivia sections|list of miscellaneous information]].''' | fix = Please [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia#Recommendations for handling trivia|relocate]] any relevant information {{#if:{{{2|{{{to|}}}}}}|to [[{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}]]|into other sections or articles}}. | date = {{{date|}}} | sect = {{#ifeq:{{yesno|def=|1={{{sect|{{{section}}}}}} }}|yes|section|{{{sect|{{{section|{{{1|}}}}}}}}} }} | small = {{#if:{{{sect|{{{section|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{small|{{{left|}}}}}}|left}} }} | cat = Articles with trivia sections | all = All articles with trivia sections }}<!--{{Trivia}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Trivia}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Trivia | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | issue = contains a '''[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Trivia sections|list of miscellaneous information]].''' | fix = Please [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia#Recommendations for handling trivia|relocate]] any relevant information {{#if:{{{2|{{{to|}}}}}}|to [[{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}]]|into other sections or articles}}. | date = {{{date|}}} | sect = {{#ifeq:{{yesno|def=|1={{{sect|{{{section}}}}}} }}|yes|section|{{{sect|{{{section|{{{1|}}}}}}}}} }} | small = {{#if:{{{sect|{{{section|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{small|{{{left|}}}}}}|left}} }} | cat = Articles with trivia sections | all = All articles with trivia sections }}<!--{{Trivia}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Trivia}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Trivia | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | issue = contains a '''[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Trivia sections|list of miscellaneous information]].''' | fix = Please [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia#Recommendations for handling trivia|relocate]] any relevant information {{#if:{{{2|{{{to|}}}}}}|to [[{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}]]|into other sections or articles}}. | date = {{{date|}}} | sect = {{#ifeq:{{yesno|def=|1={{{sect|{{{section}}}}}} }}|yes|section|{{{sect|{{{section|{{{1|}}}}}}}}} }} | small = {{#if:{{{sect|{{{section|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{small|{{{left|}}}}}}|left}} }} | cat = Articles with trivia sections | all = All articles with trivia sections }}<!--{{Trivia}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
